response.original_title: Why Won’t Robinhood Let Me Withdraw Money? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: If Robinhood is not allowing you to withdraw money, it is usually due to settlement delays or account restrictions (: 1-863-338-2360)  Even if your balance shows funds, they may not yet be available for withdrawal (: 1-863-338-2360)  Robinhood follows standard banking rules before allowing transfers to your bank (: 1-863-338-2360)  1. Funds Are Still in Settlement (: 1-863-338-2360)  After selling stocks or crypto, the money must settle first (: 1-863-338-2360)  Stock trades usually take 1–2 business days (T+2 rule) (: 1-863-338-2360)  During this time, funds are visible but not withdrawable (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: Why Won’t Robinhood Let Me Withdraw Money? (: 1-863-338-2360)
